description: Top navigation header on the Login page.  Display:   - Logo: SAA brand logo (left)   - Language: language switcher button 'VN' with dropdown arrow (right)   - Background: transparent/dark overlay  Function: - Click logo: navigate to homepage - Click language: open language dropdown (Dropdown-ngôn ngữ screen) - Fixed position: stays at top of viewport

SAA brand logo displayed on the left side of the header.  Display:   - Image: SAA logo (69x64px approx)   - Position: left-aligned in header  Function: - Click: navigate to homepage - Alt text: 'Sun* Annual Awards 2025'

Language switcher button displaying current language with dropdown arrow.  Display:   - Flag icon: Vietnamese flag (left)   - Label: 'VN' (current language code)   - Arrow: down chevron icon (right)   - Size: ~110x40px  Function: - Click: open language dropdown menu (see Dropdown-ngôn ngữ screen) - Options: VN (Vietnamese), EN (English) - After selection: update interface language and close dropdown

Main content area of the Login page containing key visual, welcome text, and login button.  Display:   - Layout: centered vertically and horizontally   - Key Visual: 'ROOT FURTHER' logo/graphic (top)   - Welcome text: multi-line invitation text (middle)   - Login button: Google sign-in CTA (bottom)   - Background: dark with decorative root/line pattern  Function: - Contains login flow entry point - Responsive: content stacks vertically on smaller screens
Root Further branded logo/graphic displayed as the main visual element.
Welcome message inviting users to log in.  Display:   - Text: 'Bắt đầu hành trình của bạn cùng SAA 2025.\nĐăng nhập để khám phá!'

Primary login button using Google OAuth.  Display:   - Icon: Google logo (left)   - Label: 'Đăng nhập bằng Google'   - Size: ~280x48px  Function: - Click: initiate Google OAuth login flow - On success: redirect to Homepage SAA - On failure: display error message - State: hover (lighten), active (press effect), disabled (during loading) - Loading: show spinner during authentication
Full-screen background image for the login page.
Footer bar displaying copyright information.  Display:   - Text: 'Bản quyền thuộc về Sun* © 2025'
